rewritten_query:
SELECT p.s_acctbal, p.s_name, n.n_name, p.p_partkey, p.p_mfgr, p.s_address, p.s_phone, p.s_comment
FROM part p
JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
JOIN (
 SELECT ps_partkey, MIN(ps_supplycost) AS min_supplycost
 FROM partsupp
 JOIN supplier s2 ON s2.s_suppkey = partsupp.ps_suppkey
 JOIN nation n2 ON s2.s_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey
 JOIN region r2 ON n2.n_regionkey = r2.r_regionkey
 WHERE r2.r_name = 'ASIA'
 GROUP BY ps_partkey
) min_ps ON p.p_partkey = min_ps.ps_partkey AND ps.ps_supplycost = min_ps.min_supplycost
WHERE p.p_size = 46
 AND p.p_type LIKE '%NICKEL'
 AND r.r_name = 'ASIA'
ORDER BY s_acctbal DESC, n_name, s_name, p_partkey
LIMIT 100;

JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.c_custkey
JOIN (
 SELECT l_orderkey, SUM(l_quantity) AS total_quantity
 FROM lineitem
 GROUP BY l_orderkey
 HAVING SUM(l_quantity) > 315
) AS lo ON o.o_orderkey = lo.l_orderkey
ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC, o.o_orderdate
LIMIT 100;

original_query: select s_name, s_address from supplier, nation where s_suppkey in ( select ps_suppkey from partsupp where ps_partkey in ( select p_partkey from part where p_name like 'burnished%' ) and ps_availqty > ( select 0.5 * sum(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = ps_partkey and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey and l_shipdate >= date '1996-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1996-01-01' + interval '1' year ) ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'GERMANY' order by s_name;
rewritten_query:
SELECT s.s_name, s.s_address
FROM supplier s
JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE n.n_name = 'GERMANY'
AND EXISTS (
 SELECT 1
 FROM partsupp ps
 JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
 JOIN (
 SELECT l_partkey, l_suppkey, SUM(l_quantity) AS total_quantity
 FROM lineitem
 WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1996-01-01' AND l_shipdate < DATE '1996-01-01' + INTERVAL '1' YEAR
 GROUP BY l_partkey, l_suppkey
 ) li ON ps.ps_partkey = li.l_partkey AND ps.ps_suppkey = li.l_suppkey
 WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
 AND p.p_name LIKE 'burnished%'
 AND ps.ps_availqty > 0.5 * li.total_quantity
)
ORDER BY s.s_name;

original_query: select s_name, count(*) as numwait from supplier, lineitem l1, orders, nation where s_suppkey = l1.l_suppkey and o_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey and o_orderstatus = 'F' and l1.l_receiptdate > l1.l_commitdate and exists ( select * from lineitem l2 where l2.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey and l2.l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey ) and not exists ( select * from lineitem l3 where l3.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey and l3.l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey and l3.l_receiptdate > l3.l_commitdate ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'MOZAMBIQUE' group by s_name order by numwait desc, s_name limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH order_stats AS (
 SELECT 
 l_orderkey,
 COUNT(DISTINCT l_suppkey) AS supp_count,
 COUNT(DISTINCT 
 CASE WHEN l_receiptdate > l_commitdate THEN l_suppkey END
 ) AS late_count
 FROM lineitem
 GROUP BY l_orderkey
)
SELECT 
 s.s_name, 
 COUNT(*) AS numwait
FROM 
 supplier s
JOIN 
 lineitem l1 ON s.s_suppkey = l1.l_suppkey
JOIN 
 orders o ON o.o_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey
JOIN 
 nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
 order_stats os ON os.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey
WHERE 
 o.o_orderstatus = 'F'
 AND l1.l_receiptdate > l1.l_commitdate
 AND os.supp_count >= 2
 AND os.late_count = 1
 AND n.n_name = 'MOZAMBIQUE'
GROUP BY 
 s.s_name
ORDER BY 
 numwait DESC, 
 s_name
LIMIT 100;

rewritten_query:
WITH cte AS (
 SELECT 
 s.s_name,
 l1.l_orderkey,
 l1.l_suppkey,
 o.o_orderstatus,
 l1.l_receiptdate,
 l1.l_commitdate,
 COUNT(DISTINCT l_suppkey) OVER (PARTITION BY l1.l_orderkey) AS total_suppliers,
 SUM(CASE WHEN l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey AND l_receiptdate > l_commitdate THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY l1.l_orderkey) AS other_late_count
 FROM supplier s
 JOIN lineitem l1 ON s.s_suppkey = l1.l_suppkey
 JOIN orders o ON o.o_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey
 JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey AND n.n_name = 'INDONESIA'
)
SELECT s_name, COUNT(*) AS numwait
FROM cte
WHERE o_orderstatus = 'F'
AND l_receiptdate > l_commitdate
AND (total_suppliers - 1) > 0
AND other_late_count = 0
GROUP BY s_name
ORDER BY numwait DESC, s_name
LIMIT 100;

original_query: select cntrycode, count(*) as numcust, sum(c_acctbal) as totacctbal from ( select substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) as cntrycode, c_acctbal from customer where substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) in ('17', '22', '12', '18', '34', '25', '16') and c_acctbal > ( select avg(c_acctbal) from customer where c_acctbal > 0.00 and substring(c_phone from 1 for 2) in ('17', '22', '12', '18', '34', '25', '16') ) and not exists ( select * from orders where o_custkey = c_custkey ) ) as custsale group by cntrycode order by cntrycode;
rewritten_query:
WITH avg_acctbal AS (
 SELECT AVG(c_acctbal) AS avg_val
 FROM customer 
 WHERE c_acctbal > 0.00 
 AND substring(c_phone FROM 1 FOR 2) IN ('17', '22', '12', '18', '34', '25', '16')
),
filtered_customers AS (
 SELECT substring(c_phone FROM 1 FOR 2) AS cntrycode, c_acctbal, c_custkey
 FROM customer
 WHERE substring(c_phone FROM 1 FOR 2) IN ('17', '22', '12', '18', '34', '25', '16')
)
SELECT cntrycode, 
 COUNT(*) AS numcust, 
 SUM(c_acctbal) AS totacctbal
FROM filtered_customers
WHERE c_acctbal > (SELECT avg_val FROM avg_acctbal)
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders WHERE o_custkey = filtered_customers.c_custkey)
GROUP BY cntrycode
ORDER BY cntrycode;
